products.menuLine: Knob Creek Kentucky Straight Bourbon · Kentucky · $40 · 100 proof (50.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: peanut, vanilla

guidance.bestFor: Member wants age and proof without Booker's extremes.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when 9-year oak and 100 proof should stand up to a robusto — peanut, caramel, leather.
guidance.memberBlurb: Knob Creek 9 Year — peanut and oak at 100 proof. Age and strength in a pour that respects a robusto without going full cask strength.

products.menuLine: Lagavulin 16 Year · Islay, Scotland · $110 · 86 proof (43% ABV) · Notes: campfire, sea salt

guidance.bestFor: Member asks for smoky Scotch, peat, or bold cigar needs maritime smoke.
guidance.avoidIf: Peat-averse beginner or user wants light Speyside only.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants to understand peat — campfire, sea salt, and smoke done with balance.
guidance.memberBlurb: Lagavulin 16 — campfire, sea salt, and Islay smoke in a legendary 16-year pour. The Scotch that teaches peat without apology.

products.menuLine: Lagavulin 8 Year · Islay, Scotland · $75 · 96 proof (48.0% ABV) · Notes: peat, smoke

guidance.bestFor: Peat lover, wants intensity below 16 price, bold cigar.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when Lagavulin character is right but the member wants more punch — pepper, peat, 96 proof.
guidance.memberBlurb: Lagavulin 8 — younger Islay at 96 proof. Peat and pepper for nights when the 16-year feels too gentle.

products.menuLine: Laphroaig 10 Year · Islay, Scotland · $55 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: iodine, peat smoke

guidance.bestFor: Member asks how smoky, peat comparison, bold cigar.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants to understand Islay intensity — iodine, peat, and sea beside Lagavulin.
guidance.memberBlurb: Laphroaig 10 — medicinal peat and iodine on Islay. The smoke lesson for members who found Lagavulin almost too polite.

products.menuLine: Lunazul Blanco Tequila · Jalisco, Mexico · $22 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: cooked agave, citrus

guidance.bestFor: Tequila beginner, margarita night, authentic agave without premium price.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants only luxury añejo sweetness.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when the member wants real blanco agave on a budget — pepper, citrus, and cooked agave.
guidance.memberBlurb: Lunazul Blanco — 100% agave authenticity without the premium sticker. The tequila Americans bought when they were not splurging on Patrón.

products.menuLine: The Macallan 12 Year Sherry Oak · Speyside, Scotland · $70 · 86 proof (43% ABV) · Notes: sherry, dried fruit

guidance.bestFor: Member wants recognizable luxury Scotch, sherry sweetness, special occasion.
guidance.avoidIf: User wants peat smoke or lowest price Scotch.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when luxury Scotch perception matters — sherry, dried fruit, and chocolate beside a premium cigar.
guidance.memberBlurb: Macallan 12 Sherry Oak — the luxury Scotch name everyone recognizes. Dried fruit, chocolate, and sherried depth without peat.

products.menuLine: The Macallan 18 Year Sherry Oak · Speyside, Scotland · $350 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: sherry, dried fig

guidance.bestFor: Special occasion, Macallan loyalist, premium cigar celebration.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when Macallan 12 is not enough — sherry depth, fig, and chocolate for a milestone night.
guidance.memberBlurb: Macallan 18 Sherry Oak — fig, ginger, and chocolate in deep sherried oak. The Speyside milestone pour beside a celebration cigar.

products.menuLine: Maker's 46 · Kentucky · $42 · 94 proof (47.0% ABV) · Journey: Intermediate · Notes: vanilla, caramel

guidance.bestFor: Wheated fan ready for more oak, medium-full cigar night.
guidance.whyRecommend: Recommend when wheated sweetness needs more oak and spice for a medium-full cigar.
guidance.memberBlurb: Maker's 46 — wheated bourbon with seared oak staves adding cocoa and spice. More structure than red wax without leaving wheated character.
